critiques.finding: Rewrite delivered a full ResourceDetailPopup.tsx (PATHS-05 target) inside PATHS-04 to satisfy AC-3 popup wiring. PATHS-05 may need only delta review or can be marked largely satisfied.
critiques.alternative: Keep popup wiring in Paths.tsx but defer popup body polish to PATHS-05; document cross-item completion in cycle state.

critiques.finding: Crisis card titles use tel:/sms: href links (functional improvement) whereas Bubble IR uses static Text elements — acceptable UX delta for crisis resources.
critiques.alternative: Match IR non-link text and add separate CTA buttons if pixel parity is required.

critiques.finding: pathsResourcesApi static fallback seeds three demo resources when Supabase tables are absent — ensures RG renders in dev but is not live Bubble custom.resource data.
critiques.alternative: Gate fallback behind VITE_DEV_ONLY or surface empty-state copy when no backend rows exist.
